full_text:
Cao Li 曹禮
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao Li (曹禮). Considered briefly by Cao Pi to be his successor but sidelined for Cao Rui. Cao Li was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Cao Li lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
